title: Kelly, Bernadette - Permanent Secretary, Department for Transport - ACOBA advice
body: "Dame Bernadette left her role at the Department for Transport in June 2025.  Non Executive Director, Youth Futures Foundation Dame Bernadette sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a paid appointment with the Youth Futures Foundation. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in October 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Independent Member of the Council and Finance and General Purposes Committee, University of Warwick  Dame Bernadette sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with the University of Warwick. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in September 2025; and the appointment was taken up in later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  "
